ideas.name: msa-engine
ideas.author: Vehir
ideas.description: A GPU-accelerated neural reranking daemon serving the MSA-4B model over a Unix socket that re-orders memory bank retrieval results using multi-scale attention scoring, permitted as a GPU/Python exception under SOUL §7.

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Reads memory entries through the db client library for memory document prefill before neural reranking
